---
title: "DMC matters: the role of dimethyl carbonate in SEI formation on oxygen functionalized anodes"
author: ["Bikram Kumar Das", "Henry A. Cortés", "Mauricio Rincón Bonilla", "Menghao Yang", "Javier Carrasco", "Elena Akhmatskaya"]
date: 2025-07-16
publication: "Journal of Materials Chemistry A, **13**(33), 27557-27576 (2025)."
categories: ["Li-ion"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1039/d5ta02003d
url_preprint:
journ: "Journal of Materials Chemistry A"
issue: 33
page: 27557-27576
year: 2025
image: featured.png
pub_number: 13
---
